name: paradigm-preset
title: Paradigm preset mechanism (S3) — codas init --paradigm writes context-shaped dependency constraints
description: S3 of the paradigm-onboarding epic (06-21-canonical-layout). codas init --paradigm <X> writes a context-shaped dependency-constraint template (planned units + dependency_rules + canonical_placement prose) into structure.yml; dependency_direction enforces it automatically (NO new gate, NOT gate-adjacent). Preset = curated YAML data (built-in + user .codas/presets/ + community), overridable, ecosystem-honest (non-Python → advisory). Context-as-unit (vertical), layers nested. Deps: S1 done; S4 (role->path mapping) + S5/S6 (new gates) are separate. See prd.md + design.md.
creator: oydodo
